props.name: active
props.description: Toggles the active state of the React Chip component for non-selectable usage.

props.name: ariaRemoveLabel
props.description: Provides an accessible label for the remove button in the React Chip component.

props.name: as
props.description: Specifies the root element or custom component used by the React Chip component.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds custom classes to the React Chip root element.

props.name: clickable
props.description: Enables interactive hover styling and pointer cursor for the React Chip component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the contextual color of the React Chip component using CoreUI theme colors.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the React Chip component and removes interactive behavior.

props.name: filter
props.description: Turns the React Chip component into a filter chip. A filter chip is selectable and shows a leading check icon while selected.

props.name: onDeselect
props.description: Callback fired when the React Chip component becomes deselected.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Callback fired when the React Chip component requests removal by button click or keyboard action.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the React Chip component becomes selected.

props.name: onSelectedChange
props.type: ((selected: boolean, event: MouseEvent<HTMLElement, MouseEvent> | KeyboardEvent<HTMLElement>) => void) | undefined
props.description: Callback fired when the selected state of the React Chip component changes.

props.name: removable
props.description: Displays a remove button inside the React Chip component.

props.name: removeIcon
props.description: Replaces the default remove icon with a custom icon node in the React Chip component.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Enables selectable behavior and keyboard toggle support for the React Chip component.

props.name: selected
props.description: Controls the selected state of a selectable React Chip component.

props.name: selectedIcon
props.description: Replaces the default selected icon shown by a filter React Chip component with a custom icon node.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the React Chip component to small or large.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the value associated with the React Chip component, used by `CChipSet` to track selection.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets the visual variant of the React Chip component to outline style.
